instance_api_url.description: URL to your metabase instance API

session_token.description:
To generate your session token, you need to run the following command: ``` curl -X POST \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"username": "person@metabase.com", "password": "fakepassword"}' \
  http://localhost:3000/api/session
``` Then copy the value of the `id` field returned by a successful call to that API.
Note that by default, sessions are good for 14 days and needs to be regenerated.

base_url.description: Placeholder base URL used only to construct the engine runtime before the Tier-2 hook delegates to the legacy connector.

mode.description: Set to fixture for credential-free legacy fixture tests.
